$description.$value: Fixed vertical spacing for HTML typography elements — padding-top and padding-bottom values for headings and paragraphs. Static because this surrounding spacing remains constant regardless of typography context mode (interface vs prose).

none.$description: No vertical spacing — reset value. Consumed as top padding on h1, p and p_lead.

xs.$description: Minimal vertical spacing. Consumed as bottom padding on all headings (h1–h6).

sm.$description: Small vertical spacing. Consumed as top padding on subheadings (h2–h6) and bottom padding on paragraphs.

md.$description: Medium vertical spacing step in the typography padding scale.

lg.$description: Large vertical spacing step in the typography padding scale.

xl.$description: Extra-large vertical spacing step in the typography padding scale.

2xl.$description: Generous vertical spacing. Consumed as bottom padding on lead paragraphs (p_lead).

3xl.$description: Maximum vertical spacing step in the typography padding scale.
